title: Which EoE DVD has the best picture quality
display_title: Which EoE DVD has the best picture quality
wikitext:
[]: Which EoE-DVD has the best picture quality?             Quote Post by qu4d » Sat May 15, 2010 1:57 pm Well yeah. Which End of Evangelion has the best picture quality? I got the german and australian DVD which have the same video-master... It´s not bad, but when I compare it to this amv http://www.gametrailers.com/user-movie/forsaken-evangelion-amv/4181 it definitly looks worse. The amv kinda looks like the remastered platinum version of the series. Anybody got an idea? Or isn´t there any better master? :/

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat May 15, 2010 2:21 pm Yeah, I don't think EoE video quality that good exists outside of Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sun May 16, 2010 4:33 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Yeah, I don't think EoE video quality that good exists outside of Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun May 16, 2010 8:25 pm Doesn't one of the more recent Japanese releases of EoE come with English subtitles? I was under the impression that one of them did. If so, you could always import.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 16, 2010 8:43 pm None of the R2 EoE releases has English subtitles.
